featured.name: Bogdan Nemtanu
featured.text: Zosim walked me through every step and gave fair, transparent pricing. The crew was professional and left the work area spotless. The final result looks fantastic.

featured.name: Reimund Bongartz
featured.text: Zosim was on top of the project from start to finish. The structure was up in one day and the roof shingled the next morning. There were no surprises on the financials.

featured.name: Tomek Bohaczek
featured.text: Zosim and his crew exceeded our expectations. They demolished the old barn and built our new one, worked through the winter weather, and got it done. Highly recommend.
